publicSite.footer.heroTitle: Run event operations with control and confidence
publicSite.footer.heroDescription: Streamline inventory, billing, and team workflows in one place. Built for event businesses that need speed, traceability, and reliable execution.
publicSite.home.description: Transform the way you manage and execute your events with our cutting-edge platform. Optimize guest management, get real-time data, and automate workflows.
publicSite.home.problemDescription: Event teams lose hours on spreadsheets, misplaced inventory, and manual coordination across locations.
publicSite.home.problemBullet1: Manual tracking leads to errors and lost items
publicSite.home.solutionDescription: LendEvent centralizes your inventory, loans, and team workflows into one reliable platform.
publicSite.home.solutionBullet3: Automated workflows that save hours daily
publicSite.home.featureInventoryDescript: Track every item by category, type, and location with full audit history.
publicSite.home.featureLoansDescription: Create requests, manage approvals, and track returns with automated workflows.
publicSite.home.featureLocationsDescript: Coordinate stock across warehouses and branches in real time.
publicSite.home.featureDashboardsDescrip: Get actionable insights on utilization, demand, and team performance.
publicSite.home.testimonial1Quote: LendEvent eliminated our spreadsheet chaos. We now track 2,000+ items across 3 warehouses effortlessly.
publicSite.home.testimonial2Quote: The loan tracking alone saved us 10 hours a week. Our team finally has visibility into what is where.
publicSite.home.ctaBannerDescription: Join hundreds of event teams already using LendEvent to run faster, leaner operations.
publicSite.about.title: About Lend Event
publicSite.about.paragraph1: Our mission is to transform how companies plan and execute corporate events. Founded in 2024, Lend Event combines cutting-edge technology with deep industry expertise to deliver a platform that truly understands your needs.
publicSite.about.paragraph2: Our team of event professionals and software engineers works tirelessly to ensure every feature we build solves real problems and delivers measurable value to our clients.
publicSite.aboutPage.title: About LendEvent
publicSite.aboutPage.subtitle: We build tools that help operations teams run reliable and profitable event rental workflows.
publicSite.aboutPage.paragraph1: LendEvent started with a clear mission: eliminate operational bottlenecks in inventory-heavy event businesses. Our product combines rental tracking, workflow automation, and actionable analytics for growing teams.
publicSite.aboutPage.metrics: Our public catalog currently includes {planCount} subscription plans and a feature stack focused on operational control, traceability, and growth.
publicSite.aboutPage.paragraph2: Today, we support organizations across multiple regions with a platform designed for performance, traceability, and collaboration between logistics, sales, and finance.
publicSite.aboutPage.missionDescription: To eliminate operational bottlenecks in inventory-heavy event businesses through smart, reliable technology.
publicSite.aboutPage.problemDescription: Event rental companies lose revenue through manual tracking, miscounted inventory, and fragmented team communication. We built LendEvent to fix that.
publicSite.aboutPage.visionDescription: Better operational control for every growing event team — from a single warehouse to a national network of locations.

publicSite.terms.title: Terms of Service
publicSite.terms.subtitle: These terms describe the conditions under which organizations access and use the LendEvent platform.
publicSite.terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern access to and use of the LendEvent platform by customer organizations and their authorized users. By accessing the service, the customer agrees to comply with these terms and all applicable laws and regulations.
publicSite.terms.contactDescription: Questions regarding contractual terms, compliance matters, or formal legal notices may be directed to our legal team.
publicSite.terms.section.serviceScope.co: LendEvent provides software services designed to support event rental operations, inventory oversight, team coordination, and billing-related workflows. Access to specific features, usage thresholds, and service levels may vary according to the subscription selected by the customer organization.
publicSite.terms.section.accountResponsi: Each customer is responsible for maintaining complete and accurate account information, safeguarding credentials, managing user permissions appropriately, and ensuring that all authorized users comply with applicable internal policies and these terms.
publicSite.terms.section.subscriptionPay: Paid subscriptions renew in accordance with the active billing cycle unless cancelled under the applicable terms. Taxes, seat adjustments, plan upgrades, downgrades, and other commercial changes may affect the invoiced amount. Non-payment, charge disputes, or repeated billing failures may result in suspension of access to protected services.
publicSite.terms.section.acceptableUse.c: Customers may not use the platform to store or transmit unlawful material, infringe third-party rights, attempt unauthorized access, disrupt service availability, reverse engineer protected functionality where prohibited, or interfere with the security, stability, or integrity of the platform or other customer environments.
publicSite.terms.section.dataAvailabilit: LendEvent applies commercially reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect customer data and support service continuity. However, the customer acknowledges that scheduled maintenance, dependency failures, internet disruptions, force majeure events, or third-party outages may temporarily affect service performance or availability.
publicSite.terms.section.termination.con: LendEvent may suspend or terminate access where necessary to address material breach, security risk, unlawful use, or persistent non-payment. Customers may request cancellation subject to the applicable subscription commitments, notice periods, and any outstanding payment obligations accrued before the effective termination date.
publicSite.cookie.title: Cookie Policy
publicSite.cookie.subtitle: This policy explains how cookies and similar technologies are used across the LendEvent experience.
publicSite.cookie.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how LendEvent uses cookies and similar technologies to operate, secure, analyze, and improve the platform. By continuing to use the service, users acknowledge the use of these technologies as described in this policy, subject to applicable law.
publicSite.cookie.contactDescription: For questions related to cookies, privacy expectations, or compliance requests, users may contact our privacy and legal teams.
publicSite.cookie.section.essential.cont: Essential cookies are used to maintain secure sessions, support authentication and access control, prevent fraudulent activity, and preserve core platform functionality required for safe operation of the service.
publicSite.cookie.section.functional.con: Functional cookies may store selected preferences such as interface behavior, language, or workflow-related settings in order to provide a more consistent and efficient experience for returning users.
publicSite.cookie.section.analytics.cont: Analytics and performance technologies may be used to understand page usage patterns, identify stability or performance issues, and improve product decisions. Where possible, these tools are configured to limit unnecessary collection of personal data.
publicSite.cookie.section.thirdParty.con: Certain cookies may be set by integrated third-party services, including payment processors or embedded tools, when those services are actively used by the customer as part of the platform experience.
publicSite.cookie.section.managing.title: Managing Cookies
publicSite.cookie.section.managing.conte: Users may manage cookie preferences through supported browser controls or device settings. Disabling certain categories may affect secure sign-in, billing flows, session continuity, or the availability of personalized settings within the application.
